title: [trustless://interop.landscape] Workshop - Hidden Contract Accounts: Interop through ENS Namechain
description:
This workshop by taytems.eth (ENS Labs, Protocol Engineer) and gregskril.rth (ENS Labs, Developer Relations) will explore how ENS’s Namechain architecture introduces the Hidden Contract Account (HCA) model to improve interoperability, usability, and governance across wallets and networks. It will unpack how deterministic deployment (via CREATE2), human-readable authorization, and session-based interaction standards like ERC-7579 create a safer, more intuitive user experience. The session will also discuss upgrades and governance flows through DAO-controlled factories and share practical considerations for handling assets and ownership across multi-chain environments.

Workshop given during day 2 of the trustless:// conference at Devconnect Argentina 2025

https://trustlessconference.com
